objective: Strategie de Mean-reversion sur 2ZUSDC 30m. Indicateurs : Bollinger Bands(20,2), RSI(14), ATR. Entree short quand prix dessus bande superieure et RSI > 70. Stop-loss = 1.0x ATR, take-profit = 2.0x ATR.

iterations.hypothesis: 2ZUSDC exhibits mean-reversion on 30m chart; Bollinger Bands define range, RSI identifies momentum extremes, ATR measures volatility for risk scaling

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] Key risks: false breakouts from consolidation, whipsaws in sideways markets, ATR-based stops getting triggered during normal volatility. Strategy assumes clean mean-reversion without strong trends or structural shifts.
[Backup plan] If failure: switch to stochastic for entry, use Fibonacci retracement levels, or implement trend filter with MACD. If mean-reversion fails, consider momentum approach with moving average crossover.

iterations.hypothesis: Adding Bollinger Band width filter reduces false breakout signals by only entering when bands are narrow, improving mean reversion precision

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] Key weaknesses: reliance on mean-reversion after breakout may not align with actual market persistence; Bollinger Bands can stay wide open for long periods; RSI divergence signals may have low predictive value in current setup.
[Backup plan] If current strategy underperforms: switch to breakout strategy using Bollinger Bands; explore momentum-based approach with MACD and ADX; consider statistical arbitrage if relevant assets show correlated behavior.
